name: ember-lang
description: Ember language support: syntax highlighting plus diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, completion, and document symbols via the in-tree emberc language server.

emberLsp.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the emberc binary (started with --lsp). Leave empty to use the default install location (~/.ember/bin/emberc, where `make install` deploys it).

emberLsp.stdPath.description: Path to the Ember standard library (passed as EMBER_STD). Leave empty to use the default install location (~/.ember/std).
